  "actions": [
    "Identify correct terminal points using the engineered loop drawings.",
    "Perform lock-out/tag-out (LOTO) if required, disconnect the miswired conductors, and land them on the correct terminals.",

  "rationale": "The wiring is roughed in but has been landed on the wrong terminal, which is a defect that could cause equipment damage or incorrect signal transmission if energized. The work is considered 70% complete until this defect is corrected and loop checks are successfully completed.",
